title: Aegis AI Strategy
summary: AI compliance infrastructure for audit preparation, policy cross-referencing, and governance-ready enterprise controls.
business_hook: Aegis helps regulated teams surface policy conflicts early and compress audit preparation cycles.

title: Public Infrastructure Copilot
summary: GovTech planning engine that converts maintenance records and service requests into ranked infrastructure priorities.
business_hook: A municipal copilot for translating digital backlogs into capital planning decisions.

title: Compliance Twin
summary: A control-system graph for teams managing obligations, evidence, and assurance workflows across regulated environments.
business_hook: Replaces spreadsheet governance with a persistent compliance operating graph.

title: Operator Memory Cloud
summary: Shared execution memory for startup teams that need durable access to decisions, context, and workflow history.
business_hook: Improves execution velocity by reducing context loss across product, GTM, and engineering teams.

title: Civic Procurement Graph
summary: Procurement intelligence layer for agencies and vendors navigating fragmented public bids, contracts, and supplier histories.
business_hook: Turns public procurement data into a searchable intelligence layer for agencies and vendors.

title: Research Commercialization Studio
summary: Commercialization workflow for translating academic and lab research into venture briefs, prototype plans, and market tests.
business_hook: Bridges research outputs and venture formation with commercialization-ready operating assets.
